message:
Add registry ETag/caching tests with real HTTP server

Uses Bun.serve() to spin up a real HTTP test server for comprehensive
testing of the registry loader's caching behavior:

- ETag validation: If-None-Match header sent correctly
- 304 Not Modified: Returns cached data when ETag matches
- Cache updates: Fetches fresh data when ETag changes
- Cache freshness: No fetch when cache is fresh
- Stale-while-revalidate: Returns stale cache immediately
- Network failures: Falls back to cache or bundled prompts
- File integrity: Handles corrupted/missing cache files

All 10 tests use real HTTP requests, no mocking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
